category.scope_note: Industrial electric motor comparison focused on Egypt (EOS / NTRA) market access and conformity requirements.

title.en: China-to-Egypt Industrial Motor Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国工业电动机进入埃及：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國工業電動機進入埃及：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China industrial electric motor documentation against Egypt EOS / ESQ mark, GOEIC import conformity, ES/IEC 60034 efficiency, and NTRA radio requirements.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国工业电动机文件与埃及 EOS / ESQ 标志、GOEIC 进口符合性、ES/IEC 60034 能效及 NTRA 无线电要求差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國工業電動機文件與埃及 EOS / ESQ 標誌、GOEIC 進口符合性、ES/IEC 60034 能效及 NTRA 無線電要求差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, ESQ conformity assessment, customs determination, energy-efficiency approval, or market-access approval. Exporters and importers should verify current EOS, GOEIC, NTRA, Ministry of Electricity, and applicable ES/IEC requirements with qualified professionals before shipment or placing on the market.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、ESQ 合格评定、海关裁定、能效批准或市场准入批准。出口商和进口商在出货或投放市场前应与合格专业人士核验现行 EOS、GOEIC、NTRA、电力部及适用 ES/IEC 要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、ESQ 合格評定、海關裁定、能效批准或市場准入批准。出口商和進口商在出貨或投放市場前應與合格專業人士核驗現行 EOS、GOEIC、NTRA、電力部及適用 ES/IEC 要求。

answer_first.en: Egypt requires EOS mandatory ESQ mark and a GOEIC import conformity certificate for listed industrial motors; China CCC is not recognised. Voltage and frequency (380 V / 50 Hz) match, so there is no electrical conversion gap.
answer_first.zh: 埃及要求列入目录的工业电动机获得 EOS 强制 ESQ 标志和 GOEIC 进口符合性证书；中国 CCC 不被认可。电压和频率（380 V / 50 Hz）一致，无需电气转换。
answer_first.zht: 埃及要求列入目錄的工業電動機獲得 EOS 強制 ESQ 標誌和 GOEIC 進口符合性證書；中國 CCC 不被認可。電壓和頻率（380 V / 50 Hz）一致，無需電氣轉換。

editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
